metadata.description: Panel dataset: ILO public sector employment (thousands) and IMF SAP participation dummy for post-1990 democratizers, 1990-2019. Sources: ILO ILOSTAT via DBnomics, Dreher (2006) IMF programs XLS.
sources: ILO ILOSTAT PSE_TPSE_GOV_NB via DBnomics (public sector employment, thousands)
ILO ILOSTAT EMP_TEMP_SEX_ECO_NB via DBnomics (total employment, thousands)
Dreher (2006) IMF SBA + EFF program participation dummies (1990-2019)

variables.pse_thousands: ILO public sector employment, thousands of workers
variables.total_emp_thousands: ILO total employment, thousands of workers
variables.pse_share_pct: Public sector employment as % of total employment
variables.imf_sap_active: 1 if IMF SBA or EFF program active in that year (Dreher 2006)

metadata.note_sap_gap: Dreher data ends 2019; no MONA supplement for 2020-2022.
